preferred_name: Control and auxiliary circuits for Thermal overload relay

preferred_name_ml.en: Control and auxiliary circuits for Thermal overload relay
preferred_name_ml.fr: Circuits de commande et auxiliaire pour Relais thermique de surcharge
preferred_name_ml.de: Steuer- und Hilfsstromkreise des thermischen Überlastrelais
preferred_name_ml.zh: 热过载继电器的控制和辅助电路

definition: all the conductive parts of the thermal overload relay which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit

definition_ml.en: all the conductive parts of the thermal overload relay which are intended to be included in a circuit other than the main circuit
definition_ml.fr: ensemble des pièces conductrices du relais thermique de surcharge destinées à être insérées dans un circuit autre que le circuit principal
definition_ml.de: alle leitfähigen Teile des thermischen Überlastrelais, die zu anderen Stromkreisen als dem Hauptstromkreis des Geräts gehören
definition_ml.zh: 在主电路之外的电路中使用的热过载继电器的所有导电部件
